item.title: My man.
item.dc:creator: sleeperkid

item.title: Thank you Imgur for the push !
item.description:
1st part : https://imgur.com/gallery/NX1RMCS There it is! Today I was finally able to prove the truth to everyone A judge just ruled that not only everything that customer said about me were lies, but that she did it out of obsession with me that she made me lose my job as a bartender because she couldn't accept that I rejected her She went "If I can't have you, nobody will", and tbh it's extremely scary to see how many were totally okay with that.
That's the ruling from the judge + PPO Now that whole thing is forever behind me. I owe a lot to you Imgur, you guys are the ones who pushed me to go to court. So thank you ^^ sincerely. All proofs (phone records and testimonies)are public on the files of the Superior Court of Quebec (#500-17-132674-253). If any of y'all want the details of the case (and can speak French). I'm gonna go have a pint now, Cheers!

item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Trying to do more daily dirty posts dis week to catch up on my over 3k memes I have piled up to share. enjoy!
my cat was meowing and finally got on the chair next to me to sit while I prep posts.
getting back to thriving. glad you get to see this side of me now too and not just heartbroken lil potato.
yes you.
my bad memory makes it so I download memes, pile them into a folder for dumping later, start dumping from the folder after a few months and then they are all fresh to me (cause I only vaguely remember them)!
mew.
always bring a lil snacking home for your so. fries are always good.
always fun discovering new bruises from things i bumped into and forgot about until later.
you have been warned. I mean to be fair I already said I wanted some 3d printed stuff so. om. yup.
I am allowing myself to explore the creativity and curiosity I was not allowed to as a child.
heh. hehehehehe. heheheheheheheheh. mwhahahahaha. I am evil.
no cure. only cute.
it works. its fun learning to feel deeply and having others encouraging and/or teasing things out of me like that...
that it is.
lil steps that add up over time.
yes please.
I have so many of these. at some point hopefully will dump them all.
:3
didnt. didnt I just post this one. so many duplicates.
I still need to try five guys.
I am glad iam able to enjoy my solitude again.
be honest o.o
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We had a super successful little secret santa! Thank you to everyone who participated. I learned a lot and look forward to doing it next year! We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "You need only claim the events of your life to make yourself yours." -Florida Scott-Maxwell I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Wednesday STOLEN MEME Dump Of Pure Chaos #821
item.description:
1. I kinda wish this was the plot of Terminator. After he eliminates John Connor he goes and has a life and a girlfriend
2. Rural Canadians - Expectation vs Reality
3. Mood going to work today... (Where I live we call Wednesday - The Little Friday, because after Monday and Tuesday you already feel exausted)
4. This girl is so graceful and majestic
5. When the Wi-Fi is down for 2 hours
6. That mechanic magic
7. What weird US sport is this hah
8. Heavy winter here, really need one of these devices right now
9. Just Betty
10. Historians say this is was the first conflict that spark the great EMU WAR
11
12
13. Ahhh the classy and sophisticated Yorkshire Karen
14
15 As a dev who has been working 14-hour days on a game for 2 years and close to releasing this terrifies me. Help me out with some much needed positivity! P.S. If you want to check out my wacky comedic narrative game, here is my Steam page: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
I'm going to attempt to post a dump every day I have downtime at work. Hopefully by bringing attention to it I'll be motivated to keep it up. Fun will now commence.

item.title: Shadow scared the crap out of me, and Chance
item.description: This happened over the weekend. Shadow is ok, now, but gave us a scare. I never heard of PS so I'm sharing this as a psa to help and inform other dog parents.

item.title: Centered
item.dc:creator: Multipass

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1284 (cultural introspection metal band)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Also me with cinematography.
I wish I was normal and neurotypical then I wouldn't have all these fears for my friends and the world I live in and I could just be... normal?
Please, Aliens, wipe us out since that stupid small asteroid isn't anymore.
We killed the Lord God Bird. A bird that literally was seen as an embodiment of the divine by many native peoples in the southeast. And we cut down their trees and killed their swamps.
Just Fourth Crusade things.
We need to rise up and march on DC and hang these traitors to the state... and build a new constitution with true equality for all.
Azdharchid Eclipse
And how's them egg prices going, buddy? Was it worth losing your Trans friends and National Parks for it?
In preparation for a future attempt at an updated version of my Ea-Naşir inspired mead, I've built a playlist of Sumerian/Akkadian music reconstruction, and I've called it "Sumer-time Sadness." Shit like this is why I will die alone, probably executed by Republicans for refusing to bow to their king.
No kings and no lords on earth or under heaven. Would love to see a modern take of this scene play out in a capital city in a certain place.
Death. A sword day, a red day, ere the sun rises. Death, fire, and fell slaughter.
Man, if I had this jar... well, honestly if I had both, and people actually put fucking money in it, I'd be able to probably afford a camping van and would be able to flee at the drop of a hat.
Accurate.
Also accurate.
Both sexual and non sexual shenanigans, yes.
We need more protagonists, I can't do this moral support alone forever without someone DOING something.
It's exhausting. It's absolutely exhausting. Some days, I'm so exhausted I don't even want to do meme posts. But, this is one of the few ways I know how to fight. So I post. Because... maybe my post will support someone who is doing more than I can on most days to fight fascism.
Woke up from a nightmare where I was camping as part of a work team-building exercise near Williams, AZ and a forest fire started in the near distance. Embers and burning branches kept falling into the camp from above, and it seemed like I was the only one who cared to stomp them out. Finally, we marched to the train tracks to be evacuated by train, and the fire kept approaching and I realized I left a book behind in my tent, but at least had not lost my camera or backup book. Alarm woke me up before a final resolution but BOY HOWDY do we feel uneasy today. Lots more little details within the dream about/with little conversations, like me screaming at coworkers to help me stomp out embers and them refusing because "this isn't the real world anyway and nothing matters in it" Anyway.
I hate being awakened mid-dream, though, because for the rest of the day, nothing feels real, and I'm a lot more tired than usual.
There is an Old English version of this song that lives in my head right now: https://youtu.be/EA2vzk52UZc?si=XAlKTAxEGyFo5U4P Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on!
Tenontosaurus
Cake without eggs.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning. Step up. [Coughing noises]" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.

item.dc:creator: TheUglyGuy

item.title: He's a great guy. I feel bad for how hard he takes day-to-day parts of the job.
item.description: I've been in the job 4 1/2 years, he's made it just over a year. The things that I know are normal parts of out job randomly make him angry. No matter how I try to help him understand things he still takes everything too personal. I'm afraid he'll get angry over something and it'll cost him his job.

item.title: Here's some more stuff, self-care edition
item.dc:creator: phant0mfoxes

item.title: cosplay girls behind the scenes - YuzuPyon
item.description: uncut version : https://youtu.be/P-ZtpJnIC6s I was filming a get ready in cosplay video and I found this footage of me vibing to this banger. Song is no way by dongurizu, if you're interested. Some would call it too cringe to post but I have already posted way worse on this app unfortunately... so, here we are. Also, I actually can't rap at all and I know it but that's okay my intentions to be a tough anime girl were at least true, I promise. Have a great day, Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon
